title: Validator Chain Hardening
objective: Improve visibility into dry-run validator coverage, required validator commands, and blocked safety conditions without destructive actions.
risks: validator names are spread across automation folders
some validators may be planning-only and not part of a single chain
hardening must not convert DRY_RUN checks into APPLY behavior
stop_condition: Stop after producing a validator-chain hardening recommendation and command list. Do not create destructive or write-enabled validator behavior without separate APPLY approval.
notes: This packet targets validator visibility only.
Validator actions must remain local and read-only unless separately approved.
No live trading or broker path may be added.
